data.name: Naked Erotic Dance Girls
data.detailed_description:
Come home from a long, hard day and relax with your own private virtual dancer! These dancing girls are beautifully rendered with realistic body physics and engaging eye contact, curious about who ever may be watching. Observe the beauty and wonder of the female form as you explore her body in motion. They have the stamina and creativity to keep you entertained all night long!

Chill out to the game's soundtrack or turn on your own playlist. These girls will find their rhythm to keep you happy. Great for parties too!

Features

  • Diverse selection of sexy nude dancers with next-level realism
  • Endless dance sequences
  • Free form and cinematic camera viewing
  • Gorgeous lighting effects
  • Intimate dance environment

pc_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統 *: Windows 7, Windows 10
  • 處理器: Intel Core i5-7500 / AMD Ryzen 5 2600X
  • 記憶體: 8 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: NVIDIA GTX 1070 / AMD Radeon RX 580 or greater
  • DirectX: 版本：11
  • 儲存空間: 5 GB 可用空間
pc_requirements.recommended:
建議配備:
  • 作業系統 *: Windows 7, Windows 10
  • 處理器: Intel Core i7-7700 / AMD Ryzen 7 2700X
  • 記憶體: 16 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: NVIDIA RTX 2080 / AMD Radeon RX 5700 or greater
  • DirectX: 版本：11
  • 儲存空間: 5 GB 可用空間
